headline: NVIDIA Targets Secure Enterprise AI Scale With Fortinet And Red Hat Partnerships
summary: NVIDIA (NasdaqGS:NVDA) is working with Fortinet on FortiAIGate, a new AI security gateway built on NVIDIA AI and powered by Blackwell and Hopper GPUs. Red Hat is expanding its Red Hat AI Factory with NVIDIA, adding confidential computing, lifecycle auditing, and governed model-as-a-service features. Together, these launches aim to provide end to end security, policy control, and confidential compute for production scale AI agents across cloud, edge, and on premises environments. For anyone...
